productDisplayName: Puma Men's Canary Lemon Yellow T-shirt
description: CompositionCanary yellow round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, softly ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, brand logo printed at the back of the neck, graphic print on the front with lettering and flock detailing and brand logo in metallic accentsFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash with like colours in cool water at 30 degrees Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean This canary yellow t-shirt from puma is made for cricket enthusiasts for whom cricket is more than just a sport...it's a way of life! Salute your favorite sport in this tee with an eye-catching graphic print. Team it with jeans or shorts for a great sporty look.
